name: Moz Pro
tagline: SEO software for keyword research and link building
description: Moz Pro is an SEO platform offering keyword research, rank tracking, site audits, and link analysis. Known for inventing Domain Authority (DA), Moz is a trusted name in SEO — particularly popular with agencies and in-house SEO teams.
cons: Less data than Ahrefs or Semrush
use_cases: Your team or clients rely on Domain Authority as a benchmark metric for tracking link-building progress over time
You want a beginner-friendly SEO platform where the learning curve is lower than Ahrefs or Semrush
You do on-page SEO and want page-level grading with specific recommendations from the On-Page Grader
You use the free MozBar Chrome extension daily to check DA and PA while browsing competitor sites
